portalLayout.brandDescription: Leads, scheduling, estimates, invoices, photos, and follow-up in one workspace.
portalLayout.internalBrandDescription: Admin view of a selected client workspace. Use HQ for cross-client controls, health checks, and account operations.
portalLayout.quickAddDescription: Run leads, scheduling, invoices, and customer follow-up from one workspace.
portalLayout.internalQuickAddDescription: You are viewing one client workspace as TieGui admin. Use HQ for cross-client controls.
portalLayout.onboardingPausedTitle: Welcome - finish setup to activate key automation features.
portalLayout.onboardingPausedDescription: Complete the quick 5-step setup to unlock scheduling, messaging, and reporting.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: Mobile-first command view for today.
today.activityEmptyTitle: No activity yet - here’s how to get started:
today.activityEmptyBulletThree: View your schedule once a lead converts
today.followUpsSubtitle: Upcoming and overdue follow-ups for this workspace.
today.openJobsSubtitle: Project folders that still need action.

error.title: Dashboard is temporarily unavailable
error.body: We hit a server issue loading this workspace. Use calendar or inbox while we recover the dashboard.

workflow.title: Run each job from lead to payment
workflow.subtitle: Use the same flow whether the customer came in by SMS, call, web form, referral, or manual entry.

capture.title: Capture the lead
capture.detail: Start from text, phone, web form, or manual entry and keep one workspace per customer.

reply.title: Reply and follow up
reply.detail: Reply by text, call, or email, then set the next follow-up so nothing slips.

estimate.title: Build and send the estimate
estimate.detail: Price the work, send the estimate, and track viewed, approved, or declined status.

schedule.title: Schedule the job
schedule.detail: Move approved work onto the calendar and hand it off to the crew without losing context.

invoice.title: Invoice and collect
invoice.detail: Create the invoice, send it, and track what is still outstanding.

owner.queueSummary: {leadsCount, plural, one {# lead waiting} other {# leads waiting}} · {jobsCount, plural, one {# job active} other {# jobs active}}

reviewQueue.title: {count, plural, one {# conversation paused} other {# conversations paused}}
reviewQueue.subtitle: Automation paused these conversations so an owner can review and reply.

leadEngine.title: Leads to work
leadEngine.subtitle: New leads, reply speed, and missed-call recovery in one place.
leadEngine.emptyBody: Leads will appear here when customers reach out.

jobsThisWeek.title: {count, plural, one {# job on deck} other {# jobs on deck}}
jobsThisWeek.subtitle: Upcoming work for the next 7 days.
jobsThisWeek.emptyBody: Add your first job to get started.

collections.title: Money needing attention
collections.subtitle: Owner view of at-risk balances, recovery activity, and failed collection attempts.
collections.atRiskHint: Overdue, urgent, and final notice balances
collections.emptyBody: Failed automated or manual attempts will appear here when an owner needs to intervene.

setup.title: Finish setup
setup.subtitle: Only show what still needs attention before the workflow runs cleanly.

header.title: Work Queue
header.subtitle: Leads to follow up, jobs on deck, and open capacity for {orgName} in one workspace.

assignedJobs.title: Your next 7 days
assignedJobs.subtitle: The jobs you need to keep moving.
assignedJobs.nextJobBody: Your next scheduled stop will show here.
assignedJobs.emptyBody: Add your first job to get started.

replyQueue.title: Messages waiting on you
replyQueue.subtitle: Stay on top of the conversations that still need a response.
replyQueue.emptyBody: Customer messages will appear here when they need attention.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update SMS and follow-up preferences for {organizationName}.
settings.twilioAutomationLocked: You can still prepare templates, tone, and quiet hours below, but live automation toggles stay locked until messaging is truly ready.

twilioReadiness.active: Twilio messaging is live for this workspace.
twilioReadiness.pending: Twilio is connected but still pending A2P approval. Live sending stays off until the number becomes ACTIVE.
twilioReadiness.paused: Twilio is configured but currently paused for this workspace. Live sending and automations stay off until it is reactivated.
twilioReadiness.sendDisabled: Twilio is configured, but this deployment has SMS sending disabled. Messages can be drafted, but they will not send live.
twilioReadiness.tokenMissing: Twilio is configured, but this deployment is missing the token encryption key needed to read credentials safely.
twilioReadiness.notConfigured: Twilio is not configured for this workspace yet.

settings.helperMissedCallToggle: When enabled, missed callers receive a reply text within 60 seconds.
settings.helperWorkerLeadCreate: Allow workers to create organic leads from mobile quick-add.
settings.helperGhostBusting: Safely re-engages stale leads using quiet hours and nudge limits.
settings.helperVoiceNotes: Lets field teams dictate notes that save directly to the job timeline.
settings.helperMetaCapi: Sends paid-invoice conversion events to Meta for ad optimization.
settings.helperOfflineMode: Keeps Today + Jobs readable offline and queues status/note updates.
settings.helperSmsQuietHours: Automated texts send only inside this local time window (default 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM).
settings.missedCallPlaceholderEn: Hey! Sorry we missed your call. Reply here and we can still help.
settings.missedCallPlaceholderEs: Hola, perdona que perdimos tu llamada. Responde aquí y todavía te podemos ayudar.
settings.intakeAskLocationPlaceholderEn: What city are you located in?
settings.intakeAskWorkTypePlaceholderEn: What type of work do you need done?
settings.intakeAskCallbackPlaceholderEn: Pick one of these available callback times:
settings.intakeAskCallbackPlaceholderEs: Elige una de estas horas disponibles para llamada:
settings.intakeCompletionPlaceholderEn: Perfect, you're set for {{time}}. We'll follow up then.
settings.intakeCompletionPlaceholderEs: Perfecto, te agendamos para {{time}}. Te contactamos entonces.
settings.reminderTimingNote: Used for owner reminder texts before job and estimate bookings. Recipient uses the Twilio forwarding number or the first owner/admin phone on file.
settings.allowWorkerLeadCreate: Allow workers to create organic leads
settings.allowWorkerLeadCreateNote: Only owner/admin/internal users can change worker lead-entry permissions.
settings.ghostTemplateDefault: Hey {{name}}, just checking in. We can still help with your project whenever you're ready. Reply here and we can lock in next steps.
settings.automationFlagsNote: Only owner/admin/internal users can change automation feature flags.
settings.teamManagementBody: Add workspace members, change access, and suspend or reactivate team members without leaving Settings.
settings.teamReadOnlyNote: Only owner, admin, or internal users can manage workspace team access.
settings.teamCreateBody: New members get a password setup link. Existing portal users can be added directly to this workspace.
settings.teamMembersEmpty: No team members are set up for this workspace yet.
settings.teamPendingSetupNote: This user still needs to set a password before signing in.
settings.teamLastOwnerNote: This is the last active owner in the workspace. Add or reactivate another owner before removing owner access or suspending this member.
settings.teamManualInviteBody: We created the account for {email}, but the invite email could not be delivered. Share this setup link manually.

teamSaved.memberCreated: Team member created and invite email sent.
teamSaved.memberCreatedManual: Team member created. Share the manual setup link below because email delivery failed.
teamSaved.memberAdded: Existing portal user added to this workspace.

teamErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage team access for this workspace.
teamErrors.memberMissing: That team member could not be found in this workspace.
teamErrors.memberExists: That email already belongs to a workspace member here.
teamErrors.emailConflict: That email is already used by a non-client account and cannot be added here.
teamErrors.invalidTeamEmail: Enter a valid team member email.
teamErrors.invalidTeamPhone: Enter a valid E.164 phone number or leave it blank.
teamErrors.invalidTeamTimezone: Enter a valid IANA timezone or leave it blank.
teamErrors.invalidTeamStatus: Choose a valid team member status change.
teamErrors.lastOwner: You cannot remove or suspend the last active owner in this workspace.
teamErrors.inviteLinkUnavailable: Invite setup links are unavailable because this deployment is missing a public base URL.

errors.invalidSender: Enter a valid E.164 sender number.
errors.invalidMessageLanguage: Choose a valid automated message language.
errors.invalidMessage: Message must be 1600 characters or less.
errors.invalidReminder: Reminder must be between 15 and 1440 minutes.
errors.invalidReviewUrl: Review link must be a valid URL.
errors.invalidBusinessName: Business name is required and must be 120 characters or less.
errors.invalidCalendarTimezone: Calendar timezone must be a valid IANA timezone.
errors.invalidUserTimezone: Your timezone must be a valid IANA timezone.
errors.invalidSmsQuietHours: SMS quiet hours must use a valid HH:MM time.
errors.invalidGhostHours: Ghost Busting quiet hours must use a valid HH:MM time.
errors.invalidGhostMax: Ghost Busting max nudges must be between 1 and 10.
errors.invalidGhostTemplate: Ghost Busting template must be 1600 characters or less.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.emptyTitle: No events yet in your schedule.
calendar.emptyBody: Add a job or set working hours to populate your calendar.
calendar.unavailableBody: We hit a server issue loading this workspace calendar. Please refresh in a moment.
calendar.linkedLeadNotice: This booking is linked to the selected lead.
calendar.conflictBody: The selected time conflicts with another assignment. Pick a suggested slot:

jobs.title: Leads
jobs.subtitle: Lead pipeline and customer context for this workspace. Open Operational Jobs only after work is sold and ready for execution.
jobs.onboardingEmptyBody: Start by adding a lead or converting a message into a customer workspace.
jobs.spamDeleted: Spam lead removed from Leads and the caller number is now blocked from future call/text staging.
jobs.spamBlocked: Lead blocked as spam. Future auto-text and forwarding stay suppressed.
jobs.pipelineNote: This page is the lead pipeline. Keep customer communication, follow-up, pricing, and pre-sale context here.
jobs.operationsNote: Use Operational Jobs for execution, dispatch, schedule coordination, and structured field production detail after the work is sold.
jobs.emptyFilteredBody: Try another filter or switch lanes to find the leads you need.
jobs.emptySpamBody: Blocked callers and failed outbound SMS will land here instead of cluttering the main pipeline.

laneHelp.pipeline: Pipeline hides likely spam so real leads stay visible for follow-up and quoting.
laneHelp.spam: Spam Review collects blocked callers, high-risk call traffic, and failed outbound SMS for cleanup.
laneHelp.all: All Leads shows both the active pipeline and spam review items in one list.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Create and send invoices, track balances, and collect payments from one workspace.
invoices.manualTrackingNote: Online payment collection is not live yet in this workspace. Payments are recorded manually after you collect them offline.
invoices.onlineCollectionReadyNote: Hosted Stripe pay links are live in this workspace. Open invoices can be emailed with online card payment links or collected offline when needed.
invoices.onboardingBody: Finish onboarding, then open a lead or operational job and create your first invoice.
invoices.emptyOpenOnlyBody: Turn off Open only to see paid and closed invoices.
invoices.emptyFilteredBody: Adjust the filters to see invoices that match.
invoices.emptyHiddenBody: Invoices exist in this workspace, but none are visible with the current view.
invoices.emptyCreateBody: Open a lead or operational job and click Create Invoice.

collections.subtitle: {open} open invoices still need collection. {drafts} drafts still need to be sent.
collections.ownerReportSubtitle: Money view for collection activity, escalation risk, and recent failed attempts.
collections.noRecentFailures: No failed collection attempts in the last 30 days.
collections.automationHealthOk: Last invoice collections run completed cleanly and sent {sent} reminders.
collections.automationHealthError: Last invoice collections run finished with {failures} failed reminder attempts.
collections.automationHealthIdle: No invoice collections run has been recorded yet.
collections.queueRulesNote: Queue uses a {lead}-day pre-due lead time, a {cadence}-day overdue cadence, and stops after {max} reminders.
collections.escalationRulesNote: Escalation moves invoices to urgent after {urgent} overdue days and final notice after {final} overdue days.
collections.freshLinkReminderError: Could not send a fresh pay link reminder.
collections.readOnlyError: Read-only users cannot send invoice emails or reminders.
collections.workerPermissionError: You can only send reminders for invoices tied to your assigned leads.

page.title: Invoice Templates
page.description: Pick the invoice style your business uses by default for previews, printing, and PDF exports.

selector.title: Invoice Style
selector.description: Choose the default template your team uses when opening invoice previews and printing PDFs.
selector.readOnly: Read-only users can preview the current invoice style, but only owners and admins can change it.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.description: This sample uses your saved branding and the currently selected layout.

collections.title: Collections Cadence
collections.description: Control when unpaid invoices enter the follow-up queue. These rules drive queue timing, and you can optionally let the invoice collections cron auto-send reminder emails from the same queue.
collections.readOnly: Read-only users can review the collections cadence, but only owners and admins can change it.
collections.error: Could not save collections cadence. Check the reminder values and try again.
collections.enabledNote: Keep unpaid invoices in a managed reminder queue with due-now, upcoming, and maxed states.
collections.autoSendEnabledNote: When the invoice collections cron runs, due-now reminders will be emailed automatically and logged in the invoice activity trail.
collections.firstReminderLeadDaysLabel: Days before due date for the first reminder
collections.firstReminderLeadDaysHelp: Use 0 to wait until the due date. Higher values pull the first reminder into the pre-due window.
collections.overdueReminderCadenceDaysHelp: Once an invoice is overdue, the next reminder becomes due after this many days.
collections.maxRemindersHelp: After this limit is reached, the invoice stays visible as maxed instead of continuing to queue reminders.
collections.urgentAfterDaysLabel: Days overdue before an invoice becomes urgent
collections.urgentAfterDaysHelp: Use this to mark aging invoices that should move ahead of normal follow-up work.
collections.finalAfterDaysLabel: Days overdue before an invoice reaches final notice
collections.finalAfterDaysHelp: Set the last escalation threshold. This value must be greater than the urgent threshold.

messages.saveError: Could not save invoice template preference.

classic.name: Classic
classic.description: Clean black, white, and gray layout for general contractor invoices.

bold.name: Bold
bold.description: Dark header, accent color, and a stronger total-first presentation for trades.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.description: Ultra-clean compact layout with soft gray accents for smaller crews and operators.

previewInvoice.lineItemTwo: Irrigation inspection, repairs, and controller tune-up
previewInvoice.notes: Thank you for the opportunity. Work includes cleanup, haul-away, and irrigation adjustments completed onsite.
previewInvoice.paymentTerms: Payment due upon receipt. ACH, check, and card are accepted.
